title: problem
purpose: Explain that agents repeat failed paths and that a claim of learning is difficult to verify.

title: cold run
purpose: Run the flagship WorkItem and show the unsafe choice plus independent failure result.

title: GPT-5.6 memory
purpose: Show the grounded structured proposal and deterministic admission decision.

title: warm rerun
purpose: Replay identical input and show exact memory attribution, avoided route, and passing verifier.

title: negative control
purpose: Apply irrelevant or wrong-scope memory and show that it cannot manufacture success.

title: evidence and implementation
purpose: Export the bundle and explain Codex, GPT-5.6, GraphReFly, and the independent verifier boundary.

title: close
purpose: Deliver one sentence on developer impact.
